# Menerick Piano & Voice Studios — Full Site Content

> Piano & voice lessons in Grand Rapids, MI and along the Lakeshore.
> Private and group instruction for ages 4 through adult.
> Website: https://grandrapidspiano.com/

---

## Home

**Tagline:** Where Grand Rapids Finds Its Resonance.

Menerick Piano & Voice Studios offers over 40 years of masterful piano and voice instruction in West Michigan. The studio serves medical professionals, high-achieving families, and urban creatives seeking cognitive development, stress relief, and musical artistry.

**Studio stats:**
- 40+ years teaching piano & voice
- National Guild of Piano Teachers member since 1979

**Core values:**
1. Cognitive Development — Suzuki-informed method develops patience, problem-solving, and deep focus.
2. A Restorative Outlet — Piano study provides proven stress relief and neurological reset.
3. Elevated Performance — From studio run-throughs to formal Spring Recitals.
4. Tailored Instruction — Uniquely crafted curricula that respect each student's time and goals.

---

## Who We Serve

The studio is a haven for individuals and families across Grand Rapids who value excellence, discipline, and the enrichment that musical mastery provides.

**Medical Professionals:** The pace on the Medical Mile demands relentless precision. Piano study offers a restorative challenge that activates new neural pathways while providing profound stress relief — a true cognitive reset after a demanding week at Corewell Health.

**High-Achieving Families:** From Forest Hills to East Grand Rapids and Ada, our curriculum instills discipline, patience, and screen-free focus. Students gain a cognitive edge and the lifelong gift of musical mastery.

**Urban Creatives:** Living in Heritage Hill or downtown Grand Rapids means being surrounded by a vibrant arts culture. Deepen your connection to the city's creative pulse by mastering an instrument in a sophisticated, adult-centered studio environment.

---

## About Lisa Menerick

A celebrated educator, award-winning performer, civic leader, and former Mayor of Ferrysburg, Lisa Menerick has devoted her life to the transformative power of music and to nurturing every student who walks through her studio door.

Originally from East Grand Rapids — where she grew up across the street from President Gerald R. Ford — Lisa has been a defining voice in the West Michigan music community for over four decades. A Degree Certified Teacher in the State of Michigan and a theater education major at Michigan State University, she also holds credentials from Sullins College (Bristol, VA), Wayne State University, and Grand Valley State University.

Lisa spent nearly 50 years as an elementary educator — most recently with Muskegon Public Schools — while simultaneously building one of West Michigan's most respected private piano and voice studios. Her performing career has carried her from intimate community stages to the national anthem podium at Loutit District Library's Naturalization Ceremony, the annual Ferrysburg Carol Sing, and the arena floor of the Professional Bull Riders as a licensed rodeo consultant. A professional actress in her own right, she brings a rare theatrical understanding of expression and presence to every student she teaches.

Lisa is a recognized leader within the music education profession. As President of West Michigan Piano Teachers, an Active Member of the American College of Musicians / National Guild of Piano Teachers (since 1979), and an Active Member of the Grand Rapids Piano Teachers Forum, she has shaped the standards of instruction across the region. As a competition judge for Piano and Voice, and a Tuesday Musicale Student Performance Excellence adjudicator, her evaluative expertise is widely respected. A Lifetime Member of the St. Cecilia Music Society, Lisa's commitment to West Michigan's cultural life is unwavering.

**Professional credentials and memberships:**
- Degree Certified Teacher, State of Michigan
- Active Member, American College of Musicians / National Guild of Piano Teachers — since 1979
- Active Member, Grand Rapids Piano Teachers Forum
- President, West Michigan Piano Teachers
- Professional Actress
- Lifetime Member, St. Cecilia Music Society
- Tuesday Musicale Student Performance Excellence
- Judge: Piano & Voice Competitions
- Naturalization Ceremony Vocalist
- Michigan Music Teachers National Association (MMTNA)

Lisa performs and lectures professionally, offering private and group piano and voice lessons to students from age 4 through adult — from studios in Grand Rapids and along the Lakeshore.

---

## Admissions

Lessons are available for students as young as 4 years old through adult. Both private and group instruction formats are offered.

**To get started:**
- Request a free Studio Tour & Intro Lesson
- Book a complimentary consultation

**Studio location:**
741 Kenmoor Ave. SE, Suite B
Grand Rapids, MI 49546

Phone: 616-560-1401
Email: lisamenerickpiano@gmail.com
Website: https://grandrapidspiano.com/
